title: Lead Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners
company: K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Business Development Manager at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners:
K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp South Asia Partners!
